results.rendered_html:
śiprā f.
1〉 Backe, du.  NAIGH. 4,3 .  NIR. 6,17 .  TS. PRĀT. 4,11 . pītvī śipre avepayaḥ  ṚV. 8,65,10 . 3,32,1 . 5,36,2 . 10,96,9 . 105,6 .
— 2〉 Backenstück am Helm: hiraṇyayīḥ  ṚV. 5,54,11 . 8,7,25 . am Zügel der Rosse: [Page7-0188] vi ṣyasva śipre 1,101,10 .
— 3〉 Nase  NIR. a. a. O. 
— Vgl. ayaḥ˚, daśa˚, viśipriya, vṛṣaśipra, su˚, hiraṇya˚, hiri˚.

results.rendered_html:
śiprā
1 N. of a river which issues from the Sipra lake and on the bank of which stands Ujjayinī; śiprāvātaḥ priyatama iva prārthanāca ṭukāraḥ  Me. 81. 
2 A visor or helmet.
